  • Method Details

    • auditTrail

      public Investigation.Builder auditTrail(List<AuditTrail> auditTrail)
      Audit trail of an investigation

    • auditTrail

      public Investigation.Builder auditTrail(Optional<? extends List<AuditTrail>> auditTrail)
      Audit trail of an investigation

    • clientId

      public Investigation.Builder clientId(String clientId)
      A unique identifier referencing a client The client ID serves as the unique identifier for the apex client positioned above the correspondent within the apex client configurator hierarchy. Moving forward, the account service will internally assign the client ID for all investigations.

    • clientId

      public Investigation.Builder clientId(Optional<String> clientId)
      A unique identifier referencing a client The client ID serves as the unique identifier for the apex client positioned above the correspondent within the apex client configurator hierarchy. Moving forward, the account service will internally assign the client ID for all investigations.

      public Investigation.Builder correspondentId(String correspondentId)
      A unique identifier referencing a Correspondent

    • correspondentId

      public Investigation.Builder correspondentId(Optional<String> correspondentId)
      A unique identifier referencing a Correspondent

      The time the investigation state was created

      The time the investigation state was created

    • entity

      public Investigation.Builder entity(Entity entity)
      investigation details on an entity

    • entity

      public Investigation.Builder entity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Entity> entity)
      investigation details on an entity

    • identityVerification

      public Investigation.Builder identityVerification(IdentityVerification identityVerification)
      The screen state of one screening within an investigation, one of: - `SCREEN_STATE_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `PENDING` - Screen result is pending. - `PASSED` - Screen result has passed. - `FAILED` - Screen result has failed. - `NEEDS_REVIEW` - Screen result needs manual review. - `DEFERRED_REVIEW` - Screen result is deferred for review at a later date. - `OUT_OF_SCOPE` - Screen state is out of scope for this investigation type.

    • identityVerification

      public Investigation.Builder identityVerification(Optional<? extends IdentityVerification> identityVerification)
      The screen state of one screening within an investigation, one of: - `SCREEN_STATE_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `PENDING` - Screen result is pending. - `PASSED` - Screen result has passed. - `FAILED` - Screen result has failed. - `NEEDS_REVIEW` - Screen result needs manual review. - `DEFERRED_REVIEW` - Screen result is deferred for review at a later date. - `OUT_OF_SCOPE` - Screen state is out of scope for this investigation type.

    • identityVerificationResults

      public Investigation.Builder identityVerificationResults(List<IdentityVerificationResult> identityVerificationResults)
      The results of the identity verification check

    • identityVerificationResults

      public Investigation.Builder identityVerificationResults(Optional<? extends List<IdentityVerificationResult>> identityVerificationResults)
      The results of the identity verification check

    • identityVerificationScope

      public Investigation.Builder identityVerificationScope(IdentityVerificationScope identityVerificationScope)
      Used to determine who is responsible for running identity verification checks, one of: - `IDENTITY_VERIFICATION_SCOPE_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `PERFORMED_BY_APEX` - Run CIP and CDD checks. - `PROVIDED_BY_CLIENT` - Run CDD checks with CIP provided in request.

    • identityVerificationScope

      public Investigation.Builder identityVerificationScope(Optional<? extends IdentityVerificationScope> identityVerificationScope)
      Used to determine who is responsible for running identity verification checks, one of: - `IDENTITY_VERIFICATION_SCOPE_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `PERFORMED_BY_APEX` - Run CIP and CDD checks. - `PROVIDED_BY_CLIENT` - Run CDD checks with CIP provided in request.

    • investigationRequestState

      public Investigation.Builder investigationRequestState(InvestigationRequestState investigationRequestState)
      The state of an investigation request, one of: - `INVESTIGATION_REQUEST_STATE_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `OPEN` - The investigation request is open. - `CLOSED` - The investigation request is closed.

    • investigationRequestState

      public Investigation.Builder investigationRequestState(Optional<? extends InvestigationRequestState> investigationRequestState)
      The state of an investigation request, one of: - `INVESTIGATION_REQUEST_STATE_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `OPEN` - The investigation request is open. - `CLOSED` - The investigation request is closed.

    • name

      public Investigation.Builder name(String name)
      Required: The ID for an open investigation The format is "investigations/{investigation}"

    • name

      public Investigation.Builder name(Optional<String> name)
      Required: The ID for an open investigation The format is "investigations/{investigation}"

    • watchlistScreen

      public Investigation.Builder watchlistScreen(WatchlistScreen watchlistScreen)
      The screen state of one screening within an investigation, one of: - `SCREEN_STATE_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `PENDING` - Screen result is pending. - `PASSED` - Screen result has passed. - `FAILED` - Screen result has failed. - `NEEDS_REVIEW` - Screen result needs manual review. - `DEFERRED_REVIEW` - Screen result is deferred for review at a later date. - `OUT_OF_SCOPE` - Screen state is out of scope for this investigation type.

    • watchlistScreen

      public Investigation.Builder watchlistScreen(Optional<? extends WatchlistScreen> watchlistScreen)
      The screen state of one screening within an investigation, one of: - `SCREEN_STATE_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `PENDING` - Screen result is pending. - `PASSED` - Screen result has passed. - `FAILED` - Screen result has failed. - `NEEDS_REVIEW` - Screen result needs manual review. - `DEFERRED_REVIEW` - Screen result is deferred for review at a later date. - `OUT_OF_SCOPE` - Screen state is out of scope for this investigation type.

    • build

      public Investigation build()
